query:
INSERT INTO service_packages (service_type, package_name, package_code, description, category, base_price, member_price, member_discount_percent, pricing_type, estimated_hours, deliverables, features, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('media', 'Video Production - Basic', 'MEDIA-VIDEO-BASIC', 'Short-form video production (up to 2 minutes)', 'video', 499.00, 399.20, 20, 'fixed', 12, '["Edited video file (MP4, MOV)", "Thumbnail image", "Social media cuts"]', '["Professional editing", "Background music", "Basic motion graphics", "2 revision rounds"]', TRUE, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Video Production - Professional', 'MEDIA-VIDEO-PRO', 'Full video production with scripting and professional editing (up to 5 minutes)', 'video', 1299.00, 1039.20, 20, 'fixed', 30, '["Full HD/4K video", "Script development", "Multiple format exports", "Raw footage"]', '["Script consultation", "Professional color grading", "Custom motion graphics", "Unlimited revisions"]', TRUE, 2, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Documentary/Story Video', 'MEDIA-VIDEO-DOCUMENTARY', 'Long-form documentary or story-driven video (10-30 minutes)', 'video', 3499.00, 2799.20, 20, 'fixed', 80, '["Full documentary video", "Behind-the-scenes footage", "Interview transcripts", "Promotional trailer"]', '["Full pre-production planning", "Interview filming", "Professional narration", "Archival research"]', TRUE, 3, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Podcast Production', 'MEDIA-PODCAST-EPISODE', 'Single podcast episode production with editing and mastering', 'audio', 199.00, 159.20, 20, 'per_item', 4, '["Edited audio file (MP3, WAV)", "Show notes", "Audiogram clip"]', '["Professional audio editing", "Noise reduction", "Intro/outro integration", "Level balancing"]', TRUE, 4, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Podcast Launch Package', 'MEDIA-PODCAST-LAUNCH', 'Complete podcast launch with branding, intro music, and first 4 episodes', 'audio', 1499.00, 1199.20, 20, 'fixed', 40, '["Podcast artwork", "Custom intro/outro music", "4 edited episodes", "RSS feed setup"]', '["Podcast strategy session", "Platform submission", "Show description copywriting", "Launch promotion plan"]', TRUE, 5, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Music Production - Single', 'MEDIA-MUSIC-SINGLE', 'Original music production or beat creation', 'audio', 399.00, 319.20, 20, 'fixed', 10, '["Master audio file", "Stems/tracks", "Licensing documentation"]', '["Custom composition", "Professional mixing", "Mastering included", "Commercial license"]', TRUE, 6, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Voiceover Recording', 'MEDIA-VOICEOVER', 'Professional voiceover recording and editing', 'audio', 149.00, 119.20, 20, 'per_item', 2, '["Edited voiceover file", "Multiple takes", "Various formats"]', '["Professional voice talent", "Studio quality recording", "Quick turnaround"]', TRUE, 7, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Photography Session', 'MEDIA-PHOTO-SESSION', 'Professional photography session (2 hours, 20 edited photos)', 'photography', 399.00, 319.20, 20, 'fixed', 6, '["20 edited high-res photos", "Online gallery", "Print release"]', '["2-hour session", "Professional editing", "Multiple locations", "Outfit changes"]', TRUE, 8, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Product Photography', 'MEDIA-PHOTO-PRODUCT', 'E-commerce product photography (per product, 5 angles)', 'photography', 79.00, 63.20, 20, 'per_item', 1, '["5 product images", "White background", "Web-optimized files"]', '["Professional lighting", "Multiple angles", "Retouching included"]', TRUE, 9, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Content Creation Retainer', 'MEDIA-RETAINER-MONTHLY', 'Monthly content creation subscription (video, audio, graphics)', 'subscription', 2499.00, 1999.20, 20, 'subscription', 40, '["4 videos/month", "8 social media graphics", "2 podcast episodes", "Content calendar"]', '["Dedicated content strategist", "Priority scheduling", "Monthly planning call", "Analytics reporting"]', TRUE, 10, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('media', 'Hourly Media Services', 'MEDIA-HOURLY', 'Flexible hourly media production support', 'general', 85.00, 68.00, 20, 'hourly', 1, '["Work completed within agreed scope"]', '["Video editing", "Audio production", "Motion graphics", "Quick turnaround"]', TRUE, 11, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
command:
